---
description: Skeptical pre-ship review — findings by Blocker/Major/Minor with fixes.
agent: agent
argument-hint: <blank = current diff/selection>
---

Use the `critical-review` skill to perform a skeptical, pre-ship review.

Target: ${input} — if blank, review the current diff or ${selection} in ${file}.

Report findings grouped as Blocker / Major / Minor. For each, give the evidence and a concrete fix.
